purpose: Test whether mini-Holo lift survives Gov DNA changes while keeping frontier judges, frozen packet, mini solo suite, analyst HoloAgent order, turn budget, prompts, word band, and validity gates constant.
judge_panel_policy: Keep the same frontier judge panel for all Gov ablations. Judges are the measuring instrument, not the experimental variable.
interpretation_rule: If Holo lift persists across multiple Gov models, describe it as Gov-robust within this packet and cohort. Do not claim Gov does not matter; report the Gov sensitivity range, best Gov, worst Gov, and variance.
audience_note: This lane is useful for lower-cost, high-accessibility claims: mini HoloAgents can be tested for student, college, and lightweight professional workflows while frontier judges keep the evaluation bar high.

chart_units.description: Plot each Gov route against every mini solo under identical frontier judging.
Show min, max, and mean Holo score across Gov models.
Compare token cost and latency by Gov model against score lift.
Track deterministic validity failures by Gov model.

recommended_run_order.command: Complete or reuse mini_order_a_openai_bookend as the OpenAI-mini Gov baseline.
